name: Scienta DA30 ARPES
description: High-performance hemispherical electron analyzer with 2D detection. Laser-based ARPES system with 6-axis cryogenic manipulator.

name: Scienta R4000 ARPES
description: Workhorse hemispherical analyzer used worldwide. 200mm mean radius, high angular resolution.

name: SPECS Phoibos 150
description: 150mm hemispherical analyzer with 2D-CCD detector. Synchrotron-compatible endstation.

name: VUV Laser ARPES System
description: Vacuum ultraviolet laser (6.994 eV) ARPES system with ultrahigh energy resolution (<1 meV).

name: Spin-resolved ARPES System
description: Spin-resolved ARPES system using very-low-energy electron diffraction (VLEED) spin detector.

name: Time-resolved ARPES System
description: Ultrafast pump-probe ARPES with femtosecond laser. Studies electron dynamics and photoinduced phase transitions.

name: In-situ MBE-ARPES System
description: Combined MBE growth chamber with in-situ ARPES measurement. Enables electronic structure study of freshly grown thin films.

name: Ultrahigh-resolution Laser ARPES
description: Laser-based ARPES with sub-meV energy resolution. Leading system for high-precision superconducting gap measurements.

name: Scienta Omicron DA30L
description: Large acceptance angle hemispherical analyzer. Optimized for synchrotron-based ARPES at Quantum Matter Institute.

name: Micro-ARPES System
description: Micro-focused ARPES with <1um spatial resolution. Synchrotron-based at SLS PEARL endstation.

name: HiSOR Spin-ARPES
description: Spin-resolved ARPES system at HiSOR synchrotron. World-unique capability for spin-polarized band mapping.

name: STM System
description: Low-temperature scanning tunneling microscope. Operates at 4.2K for atomic-resolution imaging and spectroscopy.

name: QPlus AFM/STM
description: Combined non-contact AFM and STM system with qPlus sensor. Operates at liquid helium temperature.

name: JEOL ARM200F TEM
description: Cs-corrected scanning transmission electron microscope for atomic-resolution imaging and EELS spectroscopy.

name: Thermo Fisher Titan Krios
description: Cryo-electron microscope for structural biology and materials science applications.

name: Bruker Dimension Icon AFM
description: High-performance atomic force microscope with PeakForce Tapping and multiple imaging modes.

name: Quantum Design PPMS
description: Physical Property Measurement System with 14T magnet. Measures electrical, magnetic, and thermal properties.

name: SQUID Magnetometer
description: Superconducting quantum interference device magnetometer. Ultra-sensitive magnetic moment measurements down to 10^-8 emu.

name: Rigaku SmartLab XRD
description: High-resolution X-ray diffractometer for thin film and powder diffraction with 9kW rotating anode.

name: Bruker D8 Advance XRD
description: X-ray diffractometer for crystal structure determination and phase analysis of materials.

name: Horiba LabRAM HR Raman
description: High-resolution Raman spectrometer with multiple laser wavelengths for materials characterization.

name: Thermo Fisher ESCALAB Xi+ XPS
description: X-ray photoelectron spectroscopy system with monochromated Al K-alpha source for surface chemical analysis.

name: Oxford Instruments Cryofree Cryostat
description: Cryogen-free measurement system with 12T superconducting magnet. Base temperature < 300 mK.

name: MBE Growth System
description: Molecular beam epitaxy system for oxide thin film growth with in-situ RHEED monitoring.

name: FEI Helios NanoLab SEM/FIB
description: Dual-beam SEM/FIB system for nanofabrication, TEM sample preparation, and 3D characterization.

name: Zeiss GeminiSEM
description: Field emission scanning electron microscope with sub-nanometer resolution for materials imaging.

name: RHK UHV LT-STM
description: Ultra-high vacuum low-temperature STM for atomic-scale imaging and tunneling spectroscopy.

name: Scienta Omicron DA30L ARPES
description: Hemispherical analyzer for laboratory and synchrotron-based ARPES on high-Tc superconductors and strongly correlated materials.

name: ARPES System with 6K Cryostat
description: Laboratory-based ARPES system with 6K closed-cycle cryostat for electronic structure of strongly correlated materials.

name: Synchrotron ARPES Endstation
description: Synchrotron-based ARPES at ALS beamline 4.0.3 (MERLIN). Soft X-ray capabilities for bulk-sensitive measurements.

name: SSRL Beamline 5-4 ARPES
description: SSRL beamline 5-4 dedicated ARPES endstation. VUV and soft X-ray range with 5-axis cryogenic manipulator.

name: Diamond I05 ARPES
description: Diamond Light Source I05 ARPES beamline. VUV to soft X-ray range with 6-axis cryomanipulator and spin detector.

name: MBE-STM Combined System
description: Combined MBE growth and low-temperature STM system for in-situ characterization of quantum materials.

name: CVD System
description: Chemical vapor deposition system for 2D material growth (graphene, TMDs, hBN) on various substrates.

name: Glovebox System
description: Inert atmosphere glovebox workstation for air-sensitive sample preparation and device fabrication.
